terms.name: LocalBrain
terms.definition: Permanent operational companion for one verified Human

terms.name: Working Memory
terms.definition: Continuously updated current mission, meeting, and task context

terms.name: Long-Term Memory
terms.definition: Lessons, missions, training, and leadership history preserved over years

terms.name: Temporary Memory
terms.definition: Scratch notes and prep that auto-expire unless promoted

terms.name: Memory Promotion
terms.definition: Governed movement between memory tiers

terms.name: Context Runtime
terms.definition: Continuous understanding of current operational situation

terms.name: Personal Timeline
terms.definition: Explainable history across today, week, month, and career

terms.name: Personal Knowledge Graph
terms.definition: Interconnected relationships, topics, projects, and skills

terms.name: Institution Connection
terms.definition: Governed link between LocalBrain and an organization

terms.name: Workspace Memory
terms.definition: Pinned missions, dashboards, and layout preferences

terms.name: Relationship Memory
terms.definition: Collaboration history with mentors, teams, and committees

terms.name: Calendar Memory
terms.definition: Habits, buffers, and scheduling preferences

terms.name: Learning Memory
terms.definition: Courses, competencies, certifications, and knowledge gaps

terms.name: Privacy Domain
terms.definition: Private, shared, institution, or federation classification

terms.name: Synchronization
terms.definition: Encrypted cross-device LocalBrain sync

terms.name: Identity Layer
terms.definition: References canonical identity without duplication

terms.name: Local Knowledge Cache
terms.definition: Offline-capable knowledge for intelligent operation

terms.name: AI Runtime
terms.definition: Hosted reasoning, planning, and preparation engines

terms.name: One Human One Brain
terms.definition: Exactly one LocalBrain per verified Human identity

terms.name: Human Centered
terms.definition: LocalBrain augments but never replaces the Human
